title: Inspect alternate kinds of OCI artifacts like "application/vnd.docker.ai.model.config.v0.1+json"
body:
```
$ skopeo inspect docker://ai/gemma3:1B-Q4_K_M
FATA[0001] unsupported image-specific operation on artifact with type "application/vnd.docker.ai.model.config.v0.1+json"
```

Instead of just bailing out.
